sales.title:
Heritage World Coin Auctions - Showcase Auction 61605, Lot 23199 — Ancients
Aurelian (AD 270-275). BI antoninianus (22mm, 3.57 gm, 1h). NGC Choice MS 5/5 - 5/5, Silvering. Serdica, ca. AD 274. IMP AVRELIANVS AVG, radiate, cuirassed bust of Aurelian right / IOVI-CON-S
sales.description:
Ancients
Aurelian (AD 270-275). BI antoninianus (22mm, 3.57 gm, 1h). NGC Choice MS 5/5 - 5/5, Silvering. Serdica, ca. AD 274. IMP AVRELIANVS AVG, radiate, cuirassed bust of Aurelian right / IOVI-CON-SER, Aurelian standing right (on left), grounded scepter in left hand, receiving globe with right hand from left hand of Sol standing left (on right), whip cradled in left arm, right foot on captive seated left before, head reverted; XXI•T• in exergue. RIC V.I 275 var. (XXI•T). Glimmering, hematite...

sales.title:
Heritage World Coin Auctions - Showcase Auction 61605, Lot 23200 — Ancients
Aurelian (AD 270-275). BI antoninianus (22mm, 3.52 gm, 1h). NGC MS 5/5 - 5/5, Silvering. Siscia. IMP AVRELIANVS AVG, radiate, cuirassed bust of Aurelian right, seen from front / ORIE-N-S-AVG,
sales.description:
Ancients
Aurelian (AD 270-275). BI antoninianus (22mm, 3.52 gm, 1h). NGC MS 5/5 - 5/5, Silvering. Siscia. IMP AVRELIANVS AVG, radiate, cuirassed bust of Aurelian right, seen from front / ORIE-N-S-AVG, Sol standing facing, radiate head left, right hand raised in gesture of adlocutio, globe in outstretched left, captive seated at feet to left; VI in exergue. RIC V.I 247.

Ex Heritage Auctions, Auction 231603 (21 January 2016), lot 63073.   www.HA.com/TexasAuctioneerLicenseNotice
